  "textEditContent": "import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';\nimport { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { AppModule } from './app.module';\nimport helmet from 'helmet';\nimport * as compression from 'compression';\n\nasync function bootstrap() {\n  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule, {\n    logger: ['error', 'warn', 'log', 'debug', 'verbose'],\n  });\n\n  // Security\n  app.use(helmet());\n  app.use(compression());\n\n  // CORS\n  app.enableCors({\n    origin: process.env.CORS_ORIGIN?.split(',') || '*',\n    credentials: true,\n  });\n\n  // Global validation pipe\n  app.useGlobalPipes(\n    new ValidationPipe({\n      whitelist: true,\n      forbidNonWhitelisted: true,\n      transform: true,\n    }),\n  );\n\n  // API prefix\n  app.setGlobalPrefix('api/v1');\n\n  const port = process.env.PORT || 3001;\n  await app.listen(port);\n\n  console.log(&#96;🚀 Application is running on: http://localhost:${port}&#96;);\n  console.log(&#96;📊 Health check: http://localhost:${port}/api/v1/health&#96;);\n}\n\nbootstrap();\n",

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, UnauthorizedException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { JwtService } from '@nestjs/jwt';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class AuthService {\n  constructor(\n    private prisma: PrismaService,\n    private jwtService: JwtService,\n  ) {}\n\n  async validateUser(email: string, password: string): Promise&lt;any&gt; {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });\n    if (user &amp;&amp; (await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password))) {\n      const { password, ...result } = user;\n      return result;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  async login(email: string, password: string) {\n    const user = await this.validateUser(email, password);\n    if (!user) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid credentials');\n    }\n\n    const payload = { sub: user.id, email: user.email, role: user.role };\n    return {\n      access_token: this.jwtService.sign(payload),\n      user,\n    };\n  }\n\n  async register(email: string, password: string, name: string) {\n    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.create({\n      data: {\n        email,\n        password: hashedPassword,\n        name,\n        role: 'USER',\n      },\n    });\n\n    const { password: _, ...result } = user;\n    return result;\n  }\n\n  async validateToken(token: string) {\n    try {\n      return this.jwtService.verify(token);\n    } catch {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid token');\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Post, Body, HttpCode, HttpStatus } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { AuthService } from './auth.service';\n\n@Controller('auth')\nexport class AuthController {\n  constructor(private authService: AuthService) {}\n\n  @Post('login')\n  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)\n  async login(@Body() body: { email: string; password: string }) {\n    return this.authService.login(body.email, body.password);\n  }\n\n  @Post('register')\n  async register(\n    @Body() body: { email: string; password: string; name: string },\n  ) {\n    return this.authService.register(body.email, body.password, body.name);\n  }\n}\n",

  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PassportStrategy } from '@nestjs/passport';\nimport { ExtractJwt, Strategy } from 'passport-jwt';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class JwtStrategy extends PassportStrategy(Strategy) {\n  constructor() {\n    super({\n      jwtFromRequest: ExtractJwt.fromAuthHeaderAsBearerToken(),\n      ignoreExpiration: false,\n      secretOrKey: process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'changeme',\n    });\n  }\n\n  async validate(payload: any) {\n    return { userId: payload.sub, email: payload.email, role: payload.role };\n  }\n}\n",

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/inventory/inventory.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/inventory/inventory.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class InventoryService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(cursor?: string, limit = 50) {\n    const items = await this.prisma.inventoryItem.findMany({\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      data: items,\n      nextCursor: items.length === limit ? items[items.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n\n  async findOne(id: string) {\n    return this.prisma.inventoryItem.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  }\n\n  async create(data: any) {\n    const id = uuidv4();\n    return this.prisma.inventoryItem.create({\n      data: { ...data, id },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async updateStock(id: string, quantity: number, reason: string) {\n    // Append-only: create a stock movement event\n    const movement = await this.prisma.stockMovement.create({\n      data: {\n        id: uuidv4(),\n        inventoryItemId: id,\n        quantity,\n        reason,\n        timestamp: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Update current stock\n    await this.prisma.inventoryItem.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: { currentStock: { increment: quantity } },\n    });\n\n    return movement;\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Param, Query, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { InventoryService } from './inventory.service';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@Controller('inventory')\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\nexport class InventoryController {\n  constructor(private inventoryService: InventoryService) {}\n\n  @Get()\n  async findAll(@Query('cursor') cursor?: string, @Query('limit') limit?: string) {\n    return this.inventoryService.findAll(cursor, limit ? parseInt(limit, 10) : 50);\n  }\n\n  @Get(':id')\n  async findOne(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.inventoryService.findOne(id);\n  }\n\n  @Post()\n  async create(@Body() data: any) {\n    return this.inventoryService.create(data);\n  }\n\n  @Post(':id/stock')\n  async updateStock(\n    @Param('id') id: string,\n    @Body() body: { quantity: number; reason: string },\n  ) {\n    return this.inventoryService.updateStock(id, body.quantity, body.reason);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/orders/orders.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/orders/orders.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class OrdersService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(cursor?: string, limit = 50) {\n    const orders = await this.prisma.order.findMany({\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n      include: { items: true },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      data: orders,\n      nextCursor: orders.length === limit ? orders[orders.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n\n  async findOne(id: string) {\n    return this.prisma.order.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: { items: true, events: true },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async create(data: any) {\n    const id = uuidv4();\n    // Create order with append-only event\n    return this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) =&gt; {\n      const order = await tx.order.create({\n        data: {\n          id,\n          ...data,\n          items: {\n            create: data.items.map((item: any) =&gt; ({\n              id: uuidv4(),\n              ...item,\n            })),\n          },\n        },\n        include: { items: true },\n      });\n\n      // Append event\n      await tx.orderEvent.create({\n        data: {\n          id: uuidv4(),\n          orderId: order.id,\n          eventType: 'CREATED',\n          timestamp: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      return order;\n    });\n  }\n\n  async addEvent(orderId: string, eventType: string, metadata?: any) {\n    return this.prisma.orderEvent.create({\n      data: {\n        id: uuidv4(),\n        orderId,\n        eventType,\n        metadata,\n        timestamp: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class PaymentsService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(cursor?: string, limit = 50) {\n    const payments = await this.prisma.payment.findMany({\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      data: payments,\n      nextCursor: payments.length === limit ? payments[payments.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n\n  async findOne(id: string) {\n    return this.prisma.payment.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: { events: true },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async create(data: any) {\n    const id = uuidv4();\n    return this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) =&gt; {\n      const payment = await tx.payment.create({\n        data: {\n          id,\n          ...data,\n          status: 'PENDING',\n        },\n      });\n\n      await tx.paymentEvent.create({\n        data: {\n          id: uuidv4(),\n          paymentId: payment.id,\n          eventType: 'CREATED',\n          timestamp: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      return payment;\n    });\n  }\n\n  async addEvent(paymentId: string, eventType: string, metadata?: any) {\n    return this.prisma.paymentEvent.create({\n      data: {\n        id: uuidv4(),\n        paymentId,\n        eventType,\n        metadata,\n        timestamp: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/pos/pos.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/pos/pos.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class PosService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async registerDevice(deviceId: string, metadata: any) {\n    return this.prisma.posDevice.upsert({\n      where: { deviceId },\n      create: {\n        id: uuidv4(),\n        deviceId,\n        metadata,\n        lastSeen: new Date(),\n      },\n      update: {\n        metadata,\n        lastSeen: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async createPosOrder(data: any) {\n    const id = uuidv4();\n    return this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) =&gt; {\n      const order = await tx.posOrder.create({\n        data: {\n          id,\n          ...data,\n          items: {\n            create: data.items.map((item: any) =&gt; ({\n              id: uuidv4(),\n              ...item,\n            })),\n          },\n        },\n        include: { items: true },\n      });\n\n      // Create event\n      await tx.posOrderEvent.create({\n        data: {\n          id: uuidv4(),\n          orderId: order.id,\n          eventType: 'CREATED',\n          timestamp: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      return order;\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findPosOrders(deviceId: string, cursor?: string, limit = 50) {\n    const orders = await this.prisma.posOrder.findMany({\n      where: { deviceId },\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n      include: { items: true },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      data: orders,\n      nextCursor: orders.length === limit ? orders[orders.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Query, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PosService } from './pos.service';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@Controller('pos')\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\nexport class PosController {\n  constructor(private posService: PosService) {}\n\n  @Post('devices/register')\n  async registerDevice(@Body() body: { deviceId: string; metadata: any }) {\n    return this.posService.registerDevice(body.deviceId, body.metadata);\n  }\n\n  @Post('orders')\n  async createOrder(@Body() data: any) {\n    return this.posService.createPosOrder(data);\n  }\n\n  @Get('orders')\n  async findOrders(\n    @Query('deviceId') deviceId: string,\n    @Query('cursor') cursor?: string,\n    @Query('limit') limit?: string,\n  ) {\n    return this.posService.findPosOrders(\n      deviceId,\n      cursor,\n      limit ? parseInt(limit, 10) : 50,\n    );\n  }\n}\n",

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/sync/sync.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/sync/sync.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class SyncService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  /**\n   * Push changes from client to server\n   * Implements idempotency via idempotencyKey\n   */\n  async push(data: { deviceId: string; changes: any[]; idempotencyKey: string }) {\n    const { deviceId, changes, idempotencyKey } = data;\n\n    // Check if already processed\n    const existing = await this.prisma.syncPush.findUnique({\n      where: { idempotencyKey },\n    });\n\n    if (existing) {\n      return { status: 'already_processed', pushId: existing.id };\n    }\n\n    // Process changes in transaction\n    return this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) =&gt; {\n      const pushRecord = await tx.syncPush.create({\n        data: {\n          id: uuidv4(),\n          deviceId,\n          idempotencyKey,\n          changesCount: changes.length,\n          timestamp: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      // Process each change (append to outbox)\n      for (const change of changes) {\n        await tx.outboxEvent.create({\n          data: {\n            id: uuidv4(),\n            entityType: change.entityType,\n            entityId: change.entityId,\n            operation: change.operation,\n            payload: change.payload,\n            deviceId,\n            timestamp: new Date(),\n            synced: true,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n\n      return { status: 'success', pushId: pushRecord.id };\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Pull changes from server to client\n   * Cursor-based pagination\n   */\n  async pull(data: { deviceId: string; cursor?: string; limit?: number }) {\n    const { deviceId, cursor, limit = 100 } = data;\n\n    const changes = await this.prisma.outboxEvent.findMany({\n      where: {\n        deviceId: { not: deviceId }, // Exclude own changes\n        synced: true,\n      },\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { timestamp: 'asc' },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      changes,\n      nextCursor: changes.length === limit ? changes[changes.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Acknowledge successful sync\n   */\n  async ack(data: { deviceId: string; eventIds: string[] }) {\n    await this.prisma.outboxEvent.updateMany({\n      where: {\n        id: { in: data.eventIds },\n      },\n      data: {\n        acknowledged: true,\n      },\n    });\n\n    return { status: 'success' };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Post, Body, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { SyncService } from './sync.service';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@Controller('sync')\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\nexport class SyncController {\n  constructor(private syncService: SyncService) {}\n\n  @Post('push')\n  async push(@Body() data: { deviceId: string; changes: any[]; idempotencyKey: string }) {\n    return this.syncService.push(data);\n  }\n\n  @Post('pull')\n  async pull(@Body() data: { deviceId: string; cursor?: string; limit?: number }) {\n    return this.syncService.pull(data);\n  }\n\n  @Post('ack')\n  async ack(@Body() data: { deviceId: string; eventIds: string[] }) {\n    return this.syncService.ack(data);\n  }\n}\n",

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/realtime/realtime.gateway.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/backend/src/realtime/realtime.gateway.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import {\n  WebSocketGateway,\n  WebSocketServer,\n  SubscribeMessage,\n  OnGatewayConnection,\n  OnGatewayDisconnect,\n} from '@nestjs/websockets';\nimport { Server, Socket } from 'socket.io';\n\n@WebSocketGateway({\n  cors: {\n    origin: '*',\n  },\n})\nexport class RealtimeGateway implements OnGatewayConnection, OnGatewayDisconnect {\n  @WebSocketServer()\n  server: Server;\n\n  private connectedClients = new Map&lt;string, string&gt;(); // socketId -&gt; userId\n\n  handleConnection(client: Socket) {\n    console.log(&#96;Client connected: ${client.id}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  handleDisconnect(client: Socket) {\n    console.log(&#96;Client disconnected: ${client.id}&#96;);\n    this.connectedClients.delete(client.id);\n  }\n\n  @SubscribeMessage('authenticate')\n  handleAuthenticate(client: Socket, payload: { userId: string }) {\n    this.connectedClients.set(client.id, payload.userId);\n    client.join(&#96;user:${payload.userId}&#96;);\n    return { event: 'authenticated', data: { success: true } };\n  }\n\n  @SubscribeMessage('subscribe')\n  handleSubscribe(client: Socket, payload: { channel: string }) {\n    client.join(payload.channel);\n    return { event: 'subscribed', data: { channel: payload.channel } };\n  }\n\n  @SubscribeMessage('unsubscribe')\n  handleUnsubscribe(client: Socket, payload: { channel: string }) {\n    client.leave(payload.channel);\n    return { event: 'unsubscribed', data: { channel: payload.channel } };\n  }\n\n  // Helper methods for broadcasting\n  broadcastToChannel(channel: string, event: string, data: any) {\n    this.server.to(channel).emit(event, data);\n  }\n\n  broadcastToUser(userId: string, event: string, data: any) {\n    this.server.to(&#96;user:${userId}&#96;).emit(event, data);\n  }\n\n  broadcastToAll(event: string, data: any) {\n    this.server.emit(event, data);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class AuditService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async log(data: {\n    userId?: string;\n    action: string;\n    entityType: string;\n    entityId: string;\n    metadata?: any;\n  }) {\n    return this.prisma.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        id: uuidv4(),\n        ...data,\n        timestamp: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findAll(filters: {\n    userId?: string;\n    entityType?: string;\n    entityId?: string;\n    cursor?: string;\n    limit?: number;\n  }) {\n    const { userId, entityType, entityId, cursor, limit = 50 } = filters;\n\n    const logs = await this.prisma.auditLog.findMany({\n      where: {\n        ...(userId &amp;&amp; { userId }),\n        ...(entityType &amp;&amp; { entityType }),\n        ...(entityId &amp;&amp; { entityId }),\n      },\n      take: limit,\n      ...(cursor &amp;&amp; { skip: 1, cursor: { id: cursor } }),\n      orderBy: { timestamp: 'desc' },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      data: logs,\n      nextCursor: logs.length === limit ? logs[logs.length - 1].id : null,\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

Slot : 'button'\n    return (\n      &lt;Comp\n        className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}\n        ref={ref}\n        {...props}\n      /&gt;\n    )\n  }\n)\nButton.displayName = 'Button'\n\nexport { Button, buttonVariants }\n",

  "textEditContent": "import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table'\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search, Plus, Filter } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport default function TasksPage() {\n  const tasks = [\n    {\n      id: 'TASK-001',\n      title: 'Update user documentation',\n      priority: 'high',\n      status: 'in-progress',\n      assignee: 'John Doe',\n      dueDate: '2026-01-25',\n    },\n    {\n      id: 'TASK-002',\n      title: 'Fix inventory sync issue',\n      priority: 'urgent',\n      status: 'todo',\n      assignee: 'Jane Smith',\n      dueDate: '2026-01-20',\n    },\n    {\n      id: 'TASK-003',\n      title: 'Implement payment gateway',\n      priority: 'medium',\n      status: 'in-progress',\n      assignee: 'Bob Johnson',\n      dueDate: '2026-02-01',\n    },\n    {\n      id: 'TASK-004',\n      title: 'Review security audit',\n      priority: 'high',\n      status: 'todo',\n      assignee: 'Alice Brown',\n      dueDate: '2026-01-22',\n    },\n    {\n      id: 'TASK-005',\n      title: 'Optimize database queries',\n      priority: 'low',\n      status: 'completed',\n      assignee: 'Charlie Wilson',\n      dueDate: '2026-01-18',\n    },\n  ]\n\n  const getPriorityColor = (priority: string) =&gt; {\n    switch (priority) {\n      case 'urgent':\n        return 'destructive'\n      case 'high':\n        return 'default'\n      case 'medium':\n        return 'secondary'\n      default:\n        return 'outline'\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"container mx-auto py-10\"&gt;\n      &lt;div className=\"mb-6\"&gt;\n        &lt;h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight\"&gt;Tasks&lt;/h1&gt;\n        &lt;p className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n          Manage and track your team's tasks and projects\n        &lt;/p&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n\n      &lt;Card&gt;\n        &lt;CardHeader&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\"&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;CardTitle&gt;Task List&lt;/CardTitle&gt;\n              &lt;CardDescription&gt;\n                You have {tasks.filter((t) =&gt; t.status !== 'completed').length} active tasks\n              &lt;/CardDescription&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;div className=\"flex gap-2\"&gt;\n              &lt;div className=\"relative\"&gt;\n                &lt;Search className=\"absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground\" /&gt;\n                &lt;Input placeholder=\"Search tasks...\" className=\"pl-8 w-64\" /&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;Button variant=\"outline\" size=\"icon\"&gt;\n                &lt;Filter className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;\n              &lt;/Button&gt;\n              &lt;Button&gt;\n                &lt;Plus className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /&gt;\n                New Task\n              &lt;/Button&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/CardHeader&gt;\n        &lt;CardContent&gt;\n          &lt;Table&gt;\n            &lt;TableHeader&gt;\n              &lt;TableRow&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Task ID&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Title&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Priority&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Status&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Assignee&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead&gt;Due Date&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n                &lt;TableHead className=\"text-right\"&gt;Actions&lt;/TableHead&gt;\n              &lt;/TableRow&gt;\n            &lt;/TableHeader&gt;\n            &lt;TableBody&gt;\n              {tasks.map((task) =&gt; (\n                &lt;TableRow key={task.id}&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell className=\"font-medium\"&gt;{task.id}&lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell&gt;{task.title}&lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell&gt;\n                    &lt;Badge variant={getPriorityColor(task.priority)}&gt;\n                      {task.priority}\n                    &lt;/Badge&gt;\n                  &lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell&gt;\n                    &lt;Badge variant=\"outline\"&gt;{task.status}&lt;/Badge&gt;\n                  &lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell&gt;{task.assignee}&lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell&gt;{task.dueDate}&lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                  &lt;TableCell className=\"text-right\"&gt;\n                    &lt;Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\"&gt;\n                      Edit\n                    &lt;/Button&gt;\n                  &lt;/TableCell&gt;\n                &lt;/TableRow&gt;\n              ))}\n            &lt;/TableBody&gt;\n          &lt;/Table&gt;\n        &lt;/CardContent&gt;\n      &lt;/Card&gt;\n\n      &lt;div className=\"mt-6 p-4 border rounded-lg bg-muted/50\"&gt;\n        &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n          &lt;strong&gt;Note:&lt;/strong&gt; This is a reference scaffold demonstrating table layouts\n          suitable for task tracking. The actual implementation will integrate with your\n          backend API and support full CRUD operations.\n        &lt;/p&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  )\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/core/src/sync-utils.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/core/src/sync-utils.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "/**\n * Generate a unique idempotency key for sync operations\n */\nexport function generateIdempotencyKey(deviceId: string, timestamp: number): string {\n  return &#96;${deviceId}-${timestamp}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}&#96;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate sync change payload\n */\nexport function validateSyncChange(change: any): boolean {\n  return (\n    typeof change === 'object' &amp;&amp;\n    typeof change.entityType === 'string' &amp;&amp;\n    typeof change.entityId === 'string' &amp;&amp;\n    ['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'].includes(change.operation) &amp;&amp;\n    typeof change.payload === 'object'\n  )\n}\n\n/**\n * Batch changes for efficient sync\n */\nexport function batchChanges&lt;T&gt;(items: T[], batchSize: number): T[][] {\n  const batches: T[][] = []\n  for (let i = 0; i &lt; items.length; i += batchSize) {\n    batches.push(items.slice(i, i + batchSize))\n  }\n  return batches\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate sync priority based on entity type\n */\nexport function getSyncPriority(entityType: string): number {\n  const priorities: Record&lt;string, number&gt; = {\n    payment: 1,\n    order: 2,\n    inventory: 3,\n    customer: 4,\n    default: 5,\n  }\n  return priorities[entityType] || priorities.default\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/prisma/schema.prisma)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// ============================================================\n// NUCLEUS BUSINESS SUITE - DATABASE SCHEMA\n// Append-only, offline-first, sync-ready architecture\n// ============================================================\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// USERS &amp; AUTHENTICATION\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel User {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  email     String   @unique\n  password  String\n  name      String\n  role      String   @default(\"USER\") // ADMIN, USER, MANAGER\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  auditLogs AuditLog[]\n  orders    Order[]\n  tasks     Task[]\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// INVENTORY MANAGEMENT\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel InventoryItem {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  sku          String   @unique\n  name         String\n  description  String?\n  category     String?\n  currentStock Int      @default(0)\n  reorderLevel Int      @default(0)\n  unitPrice    Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  movements StockMovement[]\n  orderItems OrderItem[]\n  posOrderItems PosOrderItem[]\n}\n\nmodel StockMovement {\n  id              String   @id @default(uuid())\n  inventoryItemId String\n  quantity        Int      // Positive for additions, negative for removals\n  reason          String   // \"purchase\", \"sale\", \"adjustment\", \"return\"\n  timestamp       DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  inventoryItem InventoryItem @relation(fields: [inventoryItemId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([inventoryItemId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// ORDERS (APPEND-ONLY)\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Order {\n  id          String   @id @default(uuid())\n  orderNumber String   @unique\n  customerId  String?\n  userId      String?\n  totalAmount Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  status      String   @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  user   User?       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  items  OrderItem[]\n  events OrderEvent[]\n\n  @@index([customerId])\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel OrderItem {\n  id              String  @id @default(uuid())\n  orderId         String\n  inventoryItemId String\n  quantity        Int\n  unitPrice       Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  subtotal        Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n\n  // Relations\n  order         Order         @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])\n  inventoryItem InventoryItem @relation(fields: [inventoryItemId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([orderId])\n}\n\nmodel OrderEvent {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  orderId   String\n  eventType String   // CREATED, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED\n  metadata  Json?\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  order Order @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([orderId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// PAYMENTS (APPEND-ONLY)\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Payment {\n  id            String   @id @default(uuid())\n  orderId       String?\n  amount        Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  method        String   // CASH, CARD, BANK_TRANSFER, ONLINE\n  status        String   @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED\n  transactionId String?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  events PaymentEvent[]\n\n  @@index([orderId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel PaymentEvent {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  paymentId String\n  eventType String   // CREATED, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED\n  metadata  Json?\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  payment Payment @relation(fields: [paymentId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([paymentId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// POS (POINT OF SALE)\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel PosDevice {\n  id         String   @id @default(uuid())\n  deviceId   String   @unique\n  name       String?\n  metadata   Json?\n  lastSeen   DateTime @default(now())\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  orders PosOrder[]\n}\n\nmodel PosOrder {\n  id          String   @id @default(uuid())\n  deviceId    String\n  orderNumber String   @unique\n  totalAmount Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  status      String   @default(\"PENDING\")\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  device PosDevice      @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [deviceId])\n  items  PosOrderItem[]\n  events PosOrderEvent[]\n\n  @@index([deviceId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel PosOrderItem {\n  id              String  @id @default(uuid())\n  orderId         String\n  inventoryItemId String\n  quantity        Int\n  unitPrice       Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  subtotal        Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n\n  // Relations\n  order         PosOrder      @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])\n  inventoryItem InventoryItem @relation(fields: [inventoryItemId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([orderId])\n}\n\nmodel PosOrderEvent {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  orderId   String\n  eventType String\n  metadata  Json?\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  order PosOrder @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([orderId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// OFFLINE SYNC (OUTBOX PATTERN)\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel OutboxEvent {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  entityType   String   // \"order\", \"payment\", \"inventory\", etc.\n  entityId     String\n  operation    String   // CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE\n  payload      Json\n  deviceId     String\n  timestamp    DateTime @default(now())\n  synced       Boolean  @default(false)\n  acknowledged Boolean  @default(false)\n\n  @@index([deviceId])\n  @@index([synced])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\nmodel SyncPush {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  deviceId       String\n  idempotencyKey String   @unique\n  changesCount   Int\n  timestamp      DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@index([deviceId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// AUDIT LOGS (APPEND-ONLY)\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel AuditLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(uuid())\n  userId     String?\n  action     String   // \"CREATE\", \"UPDATE\", \"DELETE\", \"LOGIN\", etc.\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  metadata   Json?\n  timestamp  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user User? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType])\n  @@index([entityId])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// TASKS &amp; PROJECT MANAGEMENT\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Task {\n  id          String    @id @default(uuid())\n  title       String\n  description String?\n  priority    String    @default(\"MEDIUM\") // LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT\n  status      String    @default(\"TODO\") // TODO, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED\n  assigneeId  String?\n  projectId   String?\n  dueDate     DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  assignee User? @relation(fields: [assigneeId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([assigneeId])\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([dueDate])\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

</tool-use>

  "textEditContent": "# ============================================================\n# DEVELOPMENT ENVIRONMENT - Docker Compose\n# Local mode with all services containerized\n# ============================================================\n\nversion: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  # PostgreSQL Database\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: nucleus_postgres_dev\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: postgres\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres\n      POSTGRES_DB: nucleus\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data_dev:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_dev\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U postgres\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n\n  # Redis for caching and realtime\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    container_name: nucleus_redis_dev\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data_dev:/data\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_dev\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 3s\n      retries: 5\n\n  # Backend API\n  backend:\n    build:\n      context: ..\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.backend\n    container_name: nucleus_backend_dev\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: development\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/nucleus?schema=public\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n      JWT_SECRET: dev-secret-change-in-production\n      PORT: 3001\n    ports:\n      - \"3001:3001\"\n    volumes:\n      - ../apps/backend:/app/apps/backend\n      - ../packages:/app/packages\n      - ../prisma:/app/prisma\n      - /app/node_modules\n      - /app/apps/backend/node_modules\n    depends_on:\n      postgres:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_dev\n    command: npm run dev --workspace=@nucleus/backend\n\n  # Web Frontend\n  web:\n    build:\n      context: ..\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.web\n    container_name: nucleus_web_dev\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: development\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL: http://localhost:3001\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_REALTIME_URL: ws://localhost:3002\n    ports:\n      - backend\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_dev\n    command: npm run dev --workspace=@nucleus/web\n\nvolumes:\n  postgres_data_dev:\n  redis_data_dev:\n\nnetworks:\n  nucleus_dev:\n    driver: bridge\n",

}

  "textEditContent": "# ============================================================\n# PRODUCTION ENVIRONMENT - Docker Compose\n# Default deployment mode\n# ============================================================\n\nversion: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  # PostgreSQL Database (or use external managed service)\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: nucleus_postgres_prod\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER}\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}\n      POSTGRES_DB: nucleus_prod\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data_prod:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_prod\n    restart: always\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER}\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          cpus: '2'\n          memory: 2G\n\n  # Redis\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    container_name: nucleus_redis_prod\n    command: redis-server --appendonly yes\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data_prod:/data\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_prod\n    restart: always\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          cpus: '1'\n          memory: 1G\n\n  # Backend API (with replicas)\n  backend:\n    image: ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}/nucleus-backend:${VERSION:-latest}\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: production\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/nucleus_prod?schema=public\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}\n      PORT: 3001\n      OTEL_ENABLED: ${OTEL_ENABLED:-false}\n    ports:\n      - \"3001:3001\"\n    depends_on:\n      postgres:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_started\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_prod\n    restart: always\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:3001/api/v1/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n    deploy:\n      replicas: 3\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          cpus: '2'\n          memory: 2G\n        reservations:\n          cpus: '1'\n          memory: 1G\n\n  # Web Frontend\n  web:\n    image: ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}/nucleus-web:${VERSION:-latest}\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: production\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL: https://api.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_REALTIME_URL: wss://ws.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n    ports:\n      - \"3000:3000\"\n    depends_on:\n      - backend\n    networks:\n      - nucleus_prod\n    restart: always\n    deploy:\n      replicas: 2\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          cpus: '1'\n          memory: 1G\n\n  # Nginx Reverse Proxy with SSL\n  nginx:\n    image: nginx:alpine\n    container_name: nucleus_nginx_prod\n    ports:\n      - \"80:80\"\n      - \"443:443\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./nginx/prod.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro\n      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro\n      - ./logs/nginx:/var/log/nginx\n    depends_on:\n      - web\n      -   "textEditContent": "# ============================================================\n# Backend Dockerfile\n# Multi-stage build for production efficiency\n# ============================================================\n\nFROM node:20-alpine AS base\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install dependencies only when needed\nFROM base AS deps\nCOPY package.json package-lock.json ./\nCOPY apps/backend/package.json ./apps/backend/\nCOPY packages/types/package.json ./packages/types/\nCOPY packages/core/package.json ./packages/core/\nRUN npm ci\n\n# Build source code\nFROM base AS builder\nCOPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules\nCOPY . .\nRUN npm run build --workspace=@nucleus/backend\n\n# Production image\nFROM base AS runner\nENV NODE_ENV=production\n\nRUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs\nRUN adduser --system --uid 1001 nestjs\n\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nestjs:nodejs /app/apps/backend/dist ./apps/backend/dist\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nestjs:nodejs /app/node_modules ./node_modules\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nestjs:nodejs /app/prisma ./prisma\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nestjs:nodejs /app/package.json ./\n\nUSER nestjs\n\nEXPOSE 3001\n\nCMD [\"node\", \"apps/backend/dist/main.js\"]\n",

  "textEditContent": "# Nucleus Business Suite - Architecture Documentation\n\n## Table of Contents\n1. [Overview](#overview)\n2. [Architecture Diagram](#architecture-diagram)\n3. [System Components](#system-components)\n4. [Data Flow](#data-flow)\n5. [Offline-First Architecture](#offline-first-architecture)\n6. [Realtime Communication](#realtime-communication)\n7. [Security Model](#security-model)\n8. [Deployment Architecture](#deployment-architecture)\n\n## Overview\n\nNucleus Business Suite is a production-grade, TypeScript full-stack application built with offline-first, realtime capabilities for small to medium enterprises. The system follows an append-only, event-sourced architecture to ensure data correctness and support robust offline synchronization.\n\n### Core Principles\n- **Append-Only**: No in-place edits; all changes are events\n- **Offline-First**: Local SQLite + sync when online\n- **Realtime**: WebSocket-based live updates\n- **Compose-First**: Docker Compose for all environments\n- **Kubernetes-Ready**: Optional K8s deployment\n\n## Architecture Diagram\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Client Layer\"\n        Web[Next.js Web App]\n        Mobile[React Native Mobile]\n        LocalDB[(SQLite Local)]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"API Gateway\"\n        LB[Load Balancer/Nginx]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Application Layer\"\n        API[NestJS Backend API]\n        WS[WebSocket Gateway]\n        Sync[Sync Service]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Data Layer\"\n        PG[(PostgreSQL)]\n        Redis[(Redis Cache)]\n        S3[Object Storage]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Infrastructure\"\n        Monitor[Observability&lt;br/&gt;OpenTelemetry]\n        Queue[Message Queue&lt;br/&gt;Optional]\n    end\n\n    Web --&gt; LB\n    Mobile --&gt; LB\n    LB --&gt; API\n    LB --&gt; WS\n    \n    API --&gt; PG\n    API --&gt; Redis\n    API --&gt; S3\n    WS --&gt; Redis\n    Sync --&gt; PG\n    \n    LocalDB -.Sync.-&gt; Sync\n    Mobile --&gt; LocalDB\n    \n    API --&gt; Monitor\n    WS --&gt; Monitor\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

{

  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## System Components\n\n### 1. Frontend Applications\n\n#### Web (Next.js)\n- **Technology**: Next.js 14+ with App Router\n- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS\n- **State Management**: React hooks + Context\n- **Features**:\n  - Server-side rendering (SSR)\n  - Static generation (SSG) where applicable\n  - shadcn-studio layout patterns\n  - Sample pages: /examples, /dashboard, /tasks, /auth\n\n#### Mobile (React Native + Expo)\n- **Technology**: React Native with Expo\n- **Local Storage**: SQLite for offline data\n- **Sync**: Bidirectional with backend via sync service\n\n### 2. Backend Services\n\n#### API Server (NestJS)\n- **Modules**:\n  - **Auth**: JWT-based authentication\n  - **Inventory**: Stock management with movements\n  - **Orders**: Append-only order events\n  - **Payments**: Append-only payment events\n  - **POS**: Point-of-sale device management\n  - **Sync**: Push/pull synchronization\n  - **Realtime**: WebSocket gateway\n  - **Audit**: Append-only audit logs\n\n#### Key Design Patterns\n- **Repository Pattern**: Data access abstraction\n- **Event Sourcing**: All state changes are events\n- **Outbox Pattern**: Reliable event publishing\n- **Idempotency**: Safe retry with idempotency keys\n\n### 3. Data Services\n\n#### PostgreSQL\n- **Usage**: Primary data store\n- **Schema**: Append-only tables with event logs\n- **Indexes**: Optimized for cursor-based pagination\n\n#### Redis\n- **Usage**: \n  - Caching\n  - WebSocket adapter for horizontal scaling\n  - Rate limiting\n  - Session storage\n\n#### Object Storage (S3-compatible)\n- **Usage**: File uploads, attachments, backups\n- **Providers**: AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, GCS, MinIO\n\n## Data Flow\n\n### Synchronous Request Flow\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Client\n    participant LB as Load Balancer\n    participant API as Backend API\n    participant DB as PostgreSQL\n    participant Cache as Redis\n\n    Client-&gt;&gt;LB: HTTP Request\n    LB-&gt;&gt;API: Forward Request\n    API-&gt;&gt;Cache: Check Cache\n    alt Cache Hit\n        Cache--&gt;&gt;API: Return Cached Data\n    else Cache Miss\n        API-&gt;&gt;DB: Query Database\n        DB--&gt;&gt;API: Return Data\n        API-&gt;&gt;Cache: Update Cache\n    end\n    API--&gt;&gt;LB: Response\n    LB--&gt;&gt;Client: HTTP Response\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Offline Sync Flow\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Device as Mobile Device\n    participant LocalDB as SQLite\n    participant API as Sync Service\n    participant DB as PostgreSQL\n\n    Note over Device: Offline Changes\n    Device-&gt;&gt;LocalDB: Write to Outbox\n    \n    Note over Device: Connection Available\n    Device-&gt;&gt;API: Push Changes (idempotency key)\n    API-&gt;&gt;DB: Check Idempotency\n    alt Not Processed\n        API-&gt;&gt;DB: Apply Changes\n        DB--&gt;&gt;API: Confirm\n        API--&gt;&gt;Device: Success\n    else Already Processed\n        API--&gt;&gt;Device: Already Applied\n    end\n    \n    Device-&gt;&gt;API: Pull Changes (cursor)\n    API-&gt;&gt;DB: Fetch Events &gt; cursor\n    DB--&gt;&gt;API: Return Events\n    API--&gt;&gt;Device: Events + Next Cursor\n    Device-&gt;&gt;LocalDB: Apply Events\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Offline-First Architecture\n\n### Key Components\n\n1. **Local Database (SQLite)**\n   - Stores full operational data\n   - Mirrors server schema\n   - Supports complex queries offline\n\n2. **Outbox Table**\n   - Queues changes made offline\n   - Includes idempotency keys\n   - Priority-based sync order\n\n3. **Sync Engine**\n   - Push: Sends local changes to server\n   - Pull: Fetches server changes\n   - Conflict Resolution: Server wins (last-write-wins optional)\n\n### Sync Protocol\n\n#### Push Request\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"deviceId\": \"device-uuid\",\n  \"idempotencyKey\": \"device-timestamp-random\",\n  \"changes\": [\n    {\n      \"entityType\": \"order\",\n      \"entityId\": \"order-123\",\n      \"operation\": \"CREATE\",\n      \"payload\": { ... },\n      \"timestamp\": \"2026-01-18T10:00:00Z\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Pull Request\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"deviceId\": \"device-uuid\",\n  \"cursor\": \"event-id-cursor\",\n  \"limit\": 100\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Pull Response\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"changes\": [ ... ],\n  \"nextCursor\": \"next-event-id\"\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Realtime Communication\n\n### WebSocket Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph LR\n    Client1[Client 1] --&gt; WS1[WS Gateway 1]\n    Client2[Client 2] --&gt; WS2[WS Gateway 2]\n    Client3[Client 3] --&gt; WS2\n    \n    WS1 --&gt; Redis[Redis Pub/Sub]\n    WS2 --&gt; Redis\n    \n    Redis --&gt; WS1\n    Redis --&gt; WS2\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Event Types\n- **entity.created**: New entity created\n- **entity.updated**: Entity state changed\n- **entity.deleted**: Entity soft-deleted\n- **notification**: User notification\n- **sync.required**: Trigger sync on clients\n\n### Channels\n- &#96;user:{userId}&#96;: User-specific events\n- &#96;order:{orderId}&#96;: Order-specific updates\n- &#96;global&#96;: System-wide announcements\n\n## Security Model\n\n### Authentication\n- **Method**: JWT (JSON Web Tokens)\n- **Provider**: OIDC (Keycloak recommended)\n- **Flow**: Authorization Code + PKCE\n\n### Authorization\n- **RBAC**: Role-Based Access Control\n- **Roles**: ADMIN, MANAGER, USER\n- **Scoping**: Single-tenant (multi-tenant ready)\n\n### Data Protection\n- **In Transit**: TLS 1.3\n- **At Rest**: Encrypted volumes (provider-specific)\n- **Secrets**: Environment variables + secret stores\n\n### Rate Limiting\n- **Global**: 100 requests/minute per IP\n- **Per User**: 1000 requests/hour\n- **Sync**: 10 push/pull per minute\n\n## Deployment Architecture\n\n### Development\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Local Services\n- Backend (hot reload)\n- Web (hot reload)\n- PostgreSQL\n- Redis\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Staging\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Cloud VMs\n- Backend (replicas: 2)\n- Web (replicas: 1)\n- PostgreSQL\n- Redis\n- Nginx (SSL termination)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production (Docker Compose - Default)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Cloud VMs\n- Backend (replicas: 3)\n- Web (replicas: 2)\n- PostgreSQL (managed or self-hosted)\n- Redis (managed or self-hosted)\n- Nginx (SSL + load balancing)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production (Kubernetes - Optional)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nKubernetes Cluster\n- Backend Deployment (HPA: 3-10 pods)\n- Web Deployment (HPA: 2-5 pods)\n- PostgreSQL StatefulSet\n- Redis Deployment\n- Ingress Controller (cert-manager)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Environment URLs (from inputs.yml)\n\n**Development**\n- Web: http://localhost:3000\n- API: http://localhost:3001\n- Realtime: ws://localhost:3002\n\n**Staging**\n- Web: https://staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- API: https://api-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- Realtime: wss://ws-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\n**Production**\n- Web: https://erp.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- API: https://api.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- Realtime: wss://ws.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\n### Scaling Considerations\n\n1. **Horizontal Scaling**\n   - Backend: Add more API replicas\n   - Web: Add more Next.js instances\n   - Redis: Use Redis Cluster for high availability\n\n2. **Vertical Scaling**\n   - Database: Increase CPU/RAM\n   - Backend: Optimize queries, add caching\n\n3. **Database Scaling**\n   - Read Replicas for reporting\n   - Connection pooling (PgBouncer)\n   - Partitioning for large tables\n\n## Observability\n\n### Metrics (OpenTelemetry)\n- Request latency (p50, p95, p99)\n- Error rates\n- Database query performance\n- Cache hit rates\n\n### Logging\n- Structured JSON logs\n- Correlation IDs for tracing\n- Log levels: ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG\n\n### Tracing\n- Distributed tracing across services\n- Database query traces\n- External API call traces\n\n### Health Checks\n- &#96;/api/v1/health&#96; - Basic health\n- &#96;/api/v1/health/ready&#96; - Readiness probe\n- &#96;/api/v1/health/live&#96; - Liveness probe\n\n## Disaster Recovery\n\n### Backup Strategy\n- **Database**: Daily automated backups\n- **Retention**: 30 days\n- **Object Storage**: Versioning enabled\n- **Testing**: Monthly restore drills\n\n### High Availability\n- Multi-AZ deployment\n- Database replication\n- Redis Sentinel or Cluster\n- Load balancer health checks\n\n---\n\n**Document Version**: 1.0.0  \n**Last Updated**: January 18, 2026  \n**Maintained By**: Architecture Team\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## System Components\n\n### 1. Frontend Applications\n\n#### Web (Next.js)\n- **Technology**: Next.js 14+ with App Router\n- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS\n- **State Management**: React hooks + Context\n- **Features**:\n  - Server-side rendering (SSR)\n  - Static generation (SSG) where applicable\n  - shadcn-studio layout patterns\n  - Sample pages: /examples, /dashboard, /tasks, /auth\n\n#### Mobile (React Native + Expo)\n- **Technology**: React Native with Expo\n- **Local Storage**: SQLite for offline data\n- **Sync**: Bidirectional with backend via sync service\n\n### 2. Backend Services\n\n#### API Server (NestJS)\n- **Modules**:\n  - **Auth**: JWT-based authentication\n  - **Inventory**: Stock management with movements\n  - **Orders**: Append-only order events\n  - **Payments**: Append-only payment events\n  - **POS**: Point-of-sale device management\n  - **Sync**: Push/pull synchronization\n  - **Realtime**: WebSocket gateway\n  - **Audit**: Append-only audit logs\n\n#### Key Design Patterns\n- **Repository Pattern**: Data access abstraction\n- **Event Sourcing**: All state changes are events\n- **Outbox Pattern**: Reliable event publishing\n- **Idempotency**: Safe retry with idempotency keys\n\n### 3. Data Services\n\n#### PostgreSQL\n- **Usage**: Primary data store\n- **Schema**: Append-only tables with event logs\n- **Indexes**: Optimized for cursor-based pagination\n\n#### Redis\n- **Usage**: \n  - Caching\n  - WebSocket adapter for horizontal scaling\n  - Rate limiting\n  - Session storage\n\n#### Object Storage (S3-compatible)\n- **Usage**: File uploads, attachments, backups\n- **Providers**: AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, GCS, MinIO\n\n## Data Flow\n\n### Synchronous Request Flow\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Client\n    participant LB as Load Balancer\n    participant API as Backend API\n    participant DB as PostgreSQL\n    participant Cache as Redis\n\n    Client-&gt;&gt;LB: HTTP Request\n    LB-&gt;&gt;API: Forward Request\n    API-&gt;&gt;Cache: Check Cache\n    alt Cache Hit\n        Cache--&gt;&gt;API: Return Cached Data\n    else Cache Miss\n        API-&gt;&gt;DB: Query Database\n        DB--&gt;&gt;API: Return Data\n        API-&gt;&gt;Cache: Update Cache\n    end\n    API--&gt;&gt;LB: Response\n    LB--&gt;&gt;Client: HTTP Response\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Offline Sync Flow\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Device as Mobile Device\n    participant LocalDB as SQLite\n    participant API as Sync Service\n    participant DB as PostgreSQL\n\n    Note over Device: Offline Changes\n    Device-&gt;&gt;LocalDB: Write to Outbox\n    \n    Note over Device: Connection Available\n    Device-&gt;&gt;API: Push Changes (idempotency key)\n    API-&gt;&gt;DB: Check Idempotency\n    alt Not Processed\n        API-&gt;&gt;DB: Apply Changes\n        DB--&gt;&gt;API: Confirm\n        API--&gt;&gt;Device: Success\n    else Already Processed\n        API--&gt;&gt;Device: Already Applied\n    end\n    \n    Device-&gt;&gt;API: Pull Changes (cursor)\n    API-&gt;&gt;DB: Fetch Events &gt; cursor\n    DB--&gt;&gt;API: Return Events\n    API--&gt;&gt;Device: Events + Next Cursor\n    Device-&gt;&gt;LocalDB: Apply Events\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Offline-First Architecture\n\n### Key Components\n\n1. **Local Database (SQLite)**\n   - Stores full operational data\n   - Mirrors server schema\n   - Supports complex queries offline\n\n2. **Outbox Table**\n   - Queues changes made offline\n   - Includes idempotency keys\n   - Priority-based sync order\n\n3. **Sync Engine**\n   - Push: Sends local changes to server\n   - Pull: Fetches server changes\n   - Conflict Resolution: Server wins (last-write-wins optional)\n\n### Sync Protocol\n\n#### Push Request\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"deviceId\": \"device-uuid\",\n  \"idempotencyKey\": \"device-timestamp-random\",\n  \"changes\": [\n    {\n      \"entityType\": \"order\",\n      \"entityId\": \"order-123\",\n      \"operation\": \"CREATE\",\n      \"payload\": { ... },\n      \"timestamp\": \"2026-01-18T10:00:00Z\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Pull Request\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"deviceId\": \"device-uuid\",\n  \"cursor\": \"event-id-cursor\",\n  \"limit\": 100\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Pull Response\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"changes\": [ ... ],\n  \"nextCursor\": \"next-event-id\"\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Realtime Communication\n\n### WebSocket Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph LR\n    Client1[Client 1] --&gt; WS1[WS Gateway 1]\n    Client2[Client 2] --&gt; WS2[WS Gateway 2]\n    Client3[Client 3] --&gt; WS2\n    \n    WS1 --&gt; Redis[Redis Pub/Sub]\n    WS2 --&gt; Redis\n    \n    Redis --&gt; WS1\n    Redis --&gt; WS2\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Event Types\n- **entity.created**: New entity created\n- **entity.updated**: Entity state changed\n- **entity.deleted**: Entity soft-deleted\n- **notification**: User notification\n- **sync.required**: Trigger sync on clients\n\n### Channels\n- &#96;user:{userId}&#96;: User-specific events\n- &#96;order:{orderId}&#96;: Order-specific updates\n- &#96;global&#96;: System-wide announcements\n\n## Security Model\n\n### Authentication\n- **Method**: JWT (JSON Web Tokens)\n- **Provider**: OIDC (Keycloak recommended)\n- **Flow**: Authorization Code + PKCE\n\n### Authorization\n- **RBAC**: Role-Based Access Control\n- **Roles**: ADMIN, MANAGER, USER\n- **Scoping**: Single-tenant (multi-tenant ready)\n\n### Data Protection\n- **In Transit**: TLS 1.3\n- **At Rest**: Encrypted volumes (provider-specific)\n- **Secrets**: Environment variables + secret stores\n\n### Rate Limiting\n- **Global**: 100 requests/minute per IP\n- **Per User**: 1000 requests/hour\n- **Sync**: 10 push/pull per minute\n\n## Deployment Architecture\n\n### Development\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Local Services\n- Backend (hot reload)\n- Web (hot reload)\n- PostgreSQL\n- Redis\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Staging\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Cloud VMs\n- Backend (replicas: 2)\n- Web (replicas: 1)\n- PostgreSQL\n- Redis\n- Nginx (SSL termination)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production (Docker Compose - Default)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nDocker Compose → Cloud VMs\n- Backend (replicas: 3)\n- Web (replicas: 2)\n- PostgreSQL (managed or {
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/README.md)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/README.md)",

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# 🏢 Nucleus Business Suite\n\nA production-grade, TypeScript full-stack business management application with offline-first architecture, realtime updates, and comprehensive POS capabilities.\n\n## ✨ Features\n\n- **Complete Business Management**: Inventory, orders, payments, invoicing, HR, and more\n- **Offline-First**: Works seamlessly without internet connection\n- **Realtime Updates**: WebSocket-based live notifications\n- **Point-of-Sale**: Hardware-ready POS system for retail\n- **Append-Only Data Model**: Complete audit trail and event sourcing\n- **Multi-Platform**: Web, mobile, and tablet support\n- **Production-Ready**: Kubernetes-ready, Docker-first deployment\n- **Enterprise Security**: OIDC, RBAC, rate limiting, audit logs\n\n## 🏗️ Architecture\n\n- **Frontend**: Next.js (web), React Native/Expo (mobile)\n- **Backend**: NestJS with modular architecture\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL (primary), SQLite (offline)\n- **Cache/Realtime**: Redis with Socket.IO\n- **Deployment**: Docker Compose (default), Kubernetes (optional)\n\nSee [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) for detailed diagrams and design patterns.\n\n## 📋 Requirements\n\n- Node.js 20+\n- Docker &amp; Docker Compose 5.0+\n- PostgreSQL 16+ (or use managed service)\n- Redis 7+ (or use managed service)\n\n## 🚀 Quick Start\n\n### 1. Setup Environment\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Copy environment template\ncp .env.example .env.local\n\n# Edit .env.local with your configuration\nnano .env.local\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Development with Docker\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Start all services\nnpm run docker:dev\n\n# Wait for services to be healthy (~30 seconds)\n# Then in another terminal:\n\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install\n\n# Setup database\nnpm run db:migrate:dev\n\n# Start development servers\nnpm run dev\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThis will start:\n- Backend API: http://localhost:3001\n- Web App: http://localhost:3000\n- PostgreSQL: localhost:5432\n- Redis: localhost:6379\n\n### 3. Access the Application\n\n**Web Dashboard**: http://localhost:3000\n- Example pages: /examples\n- Dashboard: /dashboard\n- Tasks: /tasks\n- Login: /auth/login\n- Register: /auth/register\n\n**API Documentation**: http://localhost:3001/api/v1\n\n## 📚 Documentation\n\n- [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) - System design and data flow\n- [API_CONTRACTS.md](./API_CONTRACTS.md) - REST/WebSocket API specifications\n- [SETUP.md](./SETUP.md) - Deployment and infrastructure guides\n\n## 🔧 Development\n\n### Project Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nnucleus-business-suite/\n├── apps/\n│   ├── backend/          # NestJS API\n│   ├── web/              # Next.js Web App\n│   └── mobile/           # React Native App\n├── packages/\n│   ├── types/            # Shared TypeScript types\n│   └── core/             # Shared utilities\n├── prisma/               # Database schema\n├── infra/                # Docker &amp; Kubernetes configs\n└── inputs.yml            # Configuration source of truth\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Key Commands\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Development\nnpm run dev              # Start all apps in dev mode\n\n# Building\nnpm run build            # Build all apps\nnpm run clean            # Clean all build artifacts\n\n# Database\nnpm run db:migrate:dev   # Run migrations\nnpm run db:studio        # Open Prisma Studio\nnpm run db:generate      # Generate Prisma client\n\n# Docker\nnpm run docker:dev       # Start Docker Compose (dev)\nnpm run docker:staging   # Start Docker Compose (staging)\nnpm run docker:prod      # Start Docker Compose (prod)\nnpm run docker:down      # Stop Docker Compose\n\n# Linting &amp; Testing\nnpm run lint             # Run ESLint\nnpm run test             # Run all tests\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 🗄️ Database\n\n### Schema Highlights\n\n- **Append-Only Design**: All entities have event tables\n- **Offline Sync**: Outbox pattern for reliable sync\n- **Audit Trails**: Complete user action history\n- **Stock Movements**: Inventory tracking with reasons\n- **POS Support**: Device management and offline orders\n\n### Migrations\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Create a new migration\nnpm run db:migrate:dev -- --name your_migration_name\n\n# Deploy migrations (production)\nnpm run db:migrate:deploy\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 🌐 Deployment\n\n### Local Development\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Staging (Docker Compose)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.staging.yml up -d\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production (Docker Compose)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production (Kubernetes)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nkubectl apply -f infra/k8s/deployment.yaml\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Environment URLs\n\nAll URLs are automatically configured based on &#96;inputs.yml&#96;:\n\n**Development**: localhost:3000 / localhost:3001  \n**Staging**: staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com  \n**Production**: erp.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\n## 🔐 Security\n\n- **JWT Authentication**: Secure token-based auth\n- **RBAC**: Role-based access control (ADMIN, MANAGER, USER)\n- **OIDC Ready**: Integrate with Keycloak or other providers\n- **Rate Limiting**: Per-IP and per-user limits\n- **Audit Logging**: Complete action trail\n- **Data Encryption**: TLS in transit, encrypted volumes at rest\n\n## 📱 Offline-First Sync\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Push changes to server\nawait sync.push({\n  deviceId: 'device-uuid',\n  changes: [{ entityType: 'order', entityId: 'id', operation: 'CREATE', payload }],\n  idempotencyKey: generateIdempotencyKey()\n})\n\n// Pull server changes\nconst { changes, nextCursor } = await sync.pull({\n  deviceId: 'device-uuid',\n  cursor: lastCursor\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nFeatures:\n- ✅ Idempotent operations (safe retries)\n- ✅ Cursor-based pagination\n- ✅ Priority-based sync order\n- ✅ Conflict resolution (server-wins)\n- ✅ Automatic retry on failure\n\n## 🔌 Realtime Events\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Subscribe to user events\nsocket.emit('subscribe', { channel: 'user:user-id' })\n\n// Listen for updates\nsocket.on('order.created', (data) =&gt; {\n  console.log('New order:', data)\n})\n\n// Supported events\n- entity.created\n- entity.updated\n- entity.deleted\n- notification\n- sync.required\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 📊 Monitoring\n\n- **OpenTelemetry** integration ready\n- **Health Checks**: &#96;/api/v1/health&#96; endpoints\n- **Structured Logging**: JSON logs with correlation IDs\n- **Metrics**: Request latency, error rates, database performance\n\n## 🐛 Troubleshooting\n\n### Database Connection Error\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Check if PostgreSQL is running\ndocker ps | grep postgres\n\n# View logs\ndocker logs nucleus_postgres_dev\n\n# Reset database\nnpm run db:migrate:reset --force\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Port Already in Use\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Find what's using the port (e.g., 3000)\nlsof -i :3000\n\n# Kill the process\nkill -9 &lt;PID&gt;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Docker Build Issues\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Rebuild images\ndocker-compose build --no-cache\n\n# Clear Docker system\ndocker system prune -a\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 📝 License\n\nProprietary - All rights reserved\n\n## 👥 Team\n\n- **Architecture**: Principal Full-Stack Architect\n- **Frontend**: Web &amp; Mobile Teams\n- **Backend**: API &amp; Services Team\n- **DevOps**: Infrastructure Team\n\n## 📞 Support\n\nFor issues, questions, or contributions:\n1. Check [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) for design questions\n2. Review [API_CONTRACTS.md](./API_CONTRACTS.md) for API details\n3. Check [SETUP.md](./SETUP.md) for deployment help\n\n---\n\n**Version**: 1.0.0  \n**Last Updated**: January 18, 2026  \n**Maintained By**: Development Team\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
